Package lu.kbra.pclib.datastructure

Interface DeepCloneable

All Superinterfaces:
Cloneable
All Known Implementing Classes:
Octuple, Pair, Quadruple, Quintuple, ReadOnlyOctuple, ReadOnlyPair, ReadOnlyQuadruple, ReadOnlyQuintuple, ReadOnlySeptuple, ReadOnlySextuple, ReadOnlyTriplet, Septuple, Sextuple, Triplet
public interface DeepCloneable extends Cloneable
